ebike

Kailua E-Bike Coastal Explorer

3 hours • Kailua Town, Oahu • easy difficulty

Book Now — $99

Ready to Book?

Select your date and reserve your spot. Tours fill up fast — especially during peak season.

Loading booking calendar...

Quick Facts

Duration
3 hours
Difficulty
easy
Location
Kailua Town, Oahu
Price
$99 per person
Group Size
1–8 guests

Highlights

  • Cruise Kailua's scenic coastal bike paths on a premium e-bike
  • Visit Lanikai Beach — consistently ranked among the world's best
  • Stop at the Pali Lookout for breathtaking views
  • Explore Kailua Town's local shops and cafes

What's Included

  • Premium electric bike (Pedego or comparable)
  • Helmet and bike lock
  • Handlebar bag for personal items
  • Route map and local recommendations
  • Guide service

What to Bring

  • → Sunscreen
  • → Comfortable clothing
  • → Closed-toe shoes
  • → Phone/camera
  • → Water bottle

Frequently Asked Questions

The tour covers approximately 12 miles at a relaxed pace with multiple stops. The e-bike makes the distance effortless — even on hills!
Yes, basic bike riding ability is required. If you haven't ridden in a while, we offer a quick refresher before departure.
Riders must be at least 14 years old and 5'0" tall. Riders under 18 must be accompanied by an adult.

Ready to Experience Kailua E-Bike Coastal Explorer?

🌊 Active Oahu Tours

Guided kayak, e-bike, and outdoor adventures on Oahu's stunning windward coast. Experience the real Hawaii with local guides who call these waters home.
